arts.ttl: Harry Kane sends warning to Mathys Tel over Man United and Tottenham interest as clubs eye up deadline day swoop for Bayern Munich ace
arts.sum: As reported by Mail Sport, United have held fresh talks over a potential deal for the young forward with deadline day rapidly approaching.

arts.ttl: Reports Danso failed Juventus medical before securing Tottenham transfer
arts.sum: Reports in Italy claim that new Tottenham Hotspur signing Kevin Danso failed a medical with...

arts.ttl: ‘I think’: Kevin Danso makes comment about Tottenham winning trophies immediately after signing
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have now announced their third signing of the January transfer window welcoming Kevin Danso to the club from RC Lens. Danso has initially...

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Tottenham simulated to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Spurs could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Kinsky; Porro, Gray, Van de Ven, Spence; Bissouma, Bergvall, Bentancur; Kulusevski, Richarlison, Son. Postecoglou's side is still suffering from a host of injury issues, and Radu Dragusin could miss out after picking up an injury midweek, though they have been handed a boost with the return of Micky van de Ven. So, can Spurs put an end to their seven-game winless run in the Premier League later today?

arts.ttl: Kevin Danso's first words on Tottenham transfer, club interest, trophies and Brentford game
arts.sum: "It feels amazing to be here at the club, I always wanted to play for a big club in the Premier League and Tottenham Hotspur is exactly that," he explained. Kevin Danso has revealed his transfer to Tottenham Hotspur is "a dream come true".

arts.ttl: Tottenham confirm late transfer before deadline day to grant Ange Postecoglou wish
arts.sum: Tottenham have confirmed the signing of RC Lens centre-back Kevin Danso on loan for the rest of the season. Danso, who has made over 100 Ligue 1 appearances and was briefly at Southampton, has played 14 times for Lens this season in all competitions.

arts.ttl: I’m embarrassed – Richie Wellens sorry for ‘stupid’ Ange Postecoglou remark
arts.sum: Leyton Orient boss Wellens has said sorry for what he said about the Tottenham manager following Saturday’s defeat to Stockport.

arts.ttl: Tottenham hijack Wolves deal to sign Kevin Danso
arts.sum: The defender had looked to move to Wolves before changing his mind and joining Spurs instead

arts.ttl: Tottenham announce Kevin Danso signing from Lens as shirt number, transfer details confirmed
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur complete the signing of Lens defender Kevin Danso on loan with an obligation to buy at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: League One manager apologises for making 'stupid' Ange Postecoglou comment - and admits he's 'deeply embarrassed' for disrespectful swipe at Tottenham boss
arts.sum: Leyton Orient manager Richie Wellens has apologised for making a 'stupid comment' about Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou after his side's 1-0 defeat against Stockport on Saturday.
